questions.objective_ref: Name each of the five roles in the context framework and state in one sentence what each role does.
Map a prompt you have already written onto the five roles, identifying which parts belong to which role.
Assemble a complete 5-role prompt in Python using an f-string or a dictionary structure.
Apply the priority rule (Authority > Exemplar > Constraint > Rubric > Metadata) to resolve a conflict when two roles give contradictory instructions.
Evaluate a prompt for missing roles and explain what output problem each missing role is likely to cause.
Name each of the five roles in the context framework and state in one sentence what each role does.
Apply the priority rule (Authority > Exemplar > Constraint > Rubric > Metadata) to resolve a conflict when two roles give contradictory instructions.
